CustomField.description: If question 8 and/or 9 above has been answered YES, will any transfer of value to HCP(s) be captured in applicable local country reporting?
CustomField.inlineHelpText: 10. If question 8 and/or 9 above has been answered YES, will any transfer of value to HCP(s) be captured in applicable local country reporting?
CustomField.label: Any transfer of value to HCP
